content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (ICM/RND from Topic A) can be repurposed as a curation gatekeeper for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory to solve the critical problem of catastrophic interference and memory bloat. Only memory traces that trigger sustained prediction error (the core signal of curiosity mechanisms) are retained in long-form agent memory, while redundant or low-information traces are pruned automatically.
